quote.text: Love is the ultimate experience. There is no obstacle that love cannot overcome.
quote.author: Yogi Bhajan

history.title: Our Story
history.p1: ACIKY (Cuban Alliance of Instructors in Kundalini Yoga) was born from the vision of sharing the transformative tools of yoga and meditation with every corner of our community. We believe that wellness is not a luxury, but a fundamental right for all.
history.p2: Over the years, we have built a refuge of peace where ancestral tradition meets the rhythm of modern life, offering a path towards physical, mental, and spiritual balance.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: ACIKY was founded with the purpose of expanding Kundalini Yoga in Cuba, making this transformative practice accessible to all people seeking balance, inner peace, and personal growth.

kundalini.title: What is Kundalini Yoga?
kundalini.description: Kundalini Yoga is an ancient practice that combines physical postures, breathing techniques, meditation, and mantras to awaken the vital energy that resides at the base of the spine.

principles.title: Guiding Principles
principles.p1: Create a nurturing environment in which each teacher can grow to their full potential.
principles.p2: Nurture self-guidance, healthy cooperation, and collaboration among teachers, as well as with individuals, organizations, and communities in our global family.
principles.p3: Create processes that meaningfully involve those who are directly relevant to or affected by a decision.
principles.p4: Place authority, exercise power, and use resources at the most local level that appropriately includes all relevant and affected parties.
principles.p5: Create no intrinsic advantage and no intrinsic disadvantage for any individual or group.
principles.p6: Foster a free, transparent, and graceful flow of information among all individuals and all parts of the organization.
principles.p7: Recognize and honor wisdom, expertise, and all thoughts and actions grounded in higher consciousness and selfless service.
principles.p8: Encourage and foster sharing, mutual support, collective enrichment, and trust in abundance.
principles.p9: Promote the development and growth of the Kundalini Yoga community, and work to uphold the integrity and coherence of the whole.
principles.p10: Maintain the highest standards of personal and professional integrity, accountability, and performance.
principles.p11: When conflict arises, seek resolution in a way that serves the needs of all parties through deep listening and loving, respectful communication.

lineage.title: Our Lineage
lineage.badge: Kundalini Yoga as taught by Yogi Bhajan®
lineage.p1: ACIKY teaches Kundalini Yoga as transmitted by Master Yogi Bhajan (1929–2004), who brought this spiritual technology from East to West in 1969 and dedicated his life to making it accessible to all of humanity.
lineage.p2: All our instructors are trained in this tradition and uphold the integrity of the original teachings: kriyas, meditations, mantras, and the philosophy of the Aquarian Dharma.

team.title: Board Committee
team.description: At ACIKY there is no single leader: decisions are made together. Each Committee member brings their voice and vision, guiding the association with horizontality and mutual respect.
team.empty: You will soon meet the Board Committee
team.joinDescription: If you feel the calling to contribute to ACIKY's growth, reach out. We'd love to have you with us!.
team.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to know more about joining ACIKY's Board Committee (este mensaje es desde el sitio web de ACIKY)

cta.title: Ready to begin?
cta.description: Join our community and start your journey towards holistic wellness.
